"rel-bounds": [0, 0, 1328, 1028], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": true, "children": [{"text": "This guide was written with the intention to help travellers in the world who use our app, understand the tipping norms of some countries. After all, when you align to the culture of a country as a visitor, you will definitely get better service and a pleasant travel experience! 

A tip is always welcomed, regardless if tipping is the norm in the country, after all, who doesn't want extra money?

But the spirit of this tipping guide is this: we make recommendations on tipping based on what a local would do, in his own country. 

We hope you find this guide useful.
Safe & happy travels!", "scrollable-vertical": false, "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "8588b7d", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View",
